channel.title: Rally News — Featured Stories
channel.description: The most uplifting and viral positive news stories, curated daily by Rally News.

item.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction
item.description: Swampy mangrove forests are staging a surprise comeback - which is good news for coastal communities and the climate.

item.title: Hopes for U.S.-Iran peace deal boosted by ceasefire agreement in Lebanon
item.description: Tehran says it wants an end to fighting between Israel and Lebanon before negotiating a deal with the U.S.

item.title: Male bowerbirds hope to dazzle females with bright human-made items
item.description: "It’s a reminder of how human activity is changing the natural world in unanticipated ways.”

item.title: BTS to release limited-edition vinyl of Arirang album with bonus tracks to mark 13th anniversary
item.description: It will include voice messages of the members' conversations and a Korean version of the song Normal.

item.title: Serena Williams to make tennis comeback at 44
item.description: The 23-time grand slam singles champion will make her long-anticipated return to competitive tennis at this month’s Queen’s Club Championships.

item.title: ‘A very fun, strange job’: The Australian who has turned whistling into a career
item.description: Molly Lewis has performed on the Barbie soundtrack album, opened for Beck on tour and has her own brand of chapstick.

item.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
item.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

item.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
item.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

item.title: Rare baby otter pups begin swimming lessons at U.K.'s Chester Zoo
item.description: Three rare giant otter pups have begun swimming lessons at the U.K.'s Chester Zoo. Led by mum Bonita and dad Manu, the rare pups were picked up by the scruff of their necks and popped straight in at the ‘deep end.'

item.title: Rare baby otter pups begin swimming lessons at U.K.'s Chester Zoo
item.description: Three rare giant otter pups have begun swimming lessons at the U.K.'s Chester Zoo. Led by mum Bonita and dad Manu, the rare pups were picked up by the scruff of their necks and popped straight in at the ‘deep end.'

item.title: Divers find five villagers alive in flooded Laos cave after more than a week
item.description: Five villagers who became trapped in a flooded cave in central Laos more than a week ago have been found alive by divers who discovered them sitting on a rock in the darkness, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are still missing.

item.title: Divers find five villagers alive in flooded Laos cave after more than a week
item.description: Five villagers who became trapped in a flooded cave in central Laos more than a week ago have been found alive by divers who discovered them sitting on a rock in the darkness, rescuers said Wednesday, but two others are still missing.
